name: The Five Blades — The Final Combat

combat_intro.title: The Volcano Route
combat_intro.narrator: The Chaos is growing. The road goes up.
combat_intro.text:
You feel the heat before you see the volcano.

The air changes.
Heavier.
More loaded.

Like before a storm.

Except there are no clouds.

Your black blade is vibrating in her sheath.

She did it all night.

You didn't sleep.

choices.text: Look at the four before you leave.

regard_matin.title: Morning
regard_matin.text:
They're preparing their business in silence.

Ikar checks his blade.
Aryn's packing her stuff carefully.
Taera tightens the purse around her neck.
Vael doesn't whistle.

That silence.

You've known them a few weeks.

That's enough to know that this silence is different.

They're scared.

Not from you.

For you.

It's different.

And it's worse.

pourquoi_volcan.title: Why here
pourquoi_volcan.text:
Aryn's walking next to you.

**"The Chaos needs a point of liberation. *
**"A place powerful enough to absorb what will come out. *

**"What if it overflows? *

She looks at the volcano in the distance.

**"The volcano has been melting for centuries. *
**"He saw others. *

Vael is passing between you two.

**"A very reassuring way to present things. *

**"I know. "** says Aryn.

She's not trying to correct it.

This is the first time.

choices.text: Ask Aryn what she really thinks.

aryn_vrai_pense.title: What She Really Thinks
aryn_vrai_pense.text:
She's thinking a long time.

**"I think you'll make it. *

**"And you believe him? *

Quiet.

**"I want to. *
**"Sufficiently strong to make it count. *

She's looking at you.

**"Caël had no one who wanted to. *
**"This is where everything has changed. *
**"Not in battle. *
**"Before. *

She's back on her walk.

**"We're here. *
**"This is what is different. *

montee_debut.title: The Mount
montee_debut.narrator: The floor is warm under the feet.
montee_debut.text:
The path goes up.

Close.
Fake.
Every step on black rock.

The old solidified lava forms walls on each side.
Frozen rivers.
Frozen in their movement.

Your blade vibrates stronger every meter.

Like she recognized the place.

Or what's coming.

montee_silence.title: The Silence of the Mount
montee_silence.text:
You're walking.

Just walk.

Heat.
The noise of the volcano.
The cracking of the rock under the feet.

In your head — Cendral.

Mira's bakery.
The wall of the square.
Old Marek and his sculpting knife.

The knife is still on your belt.

You touch him.

He's hot.

It's all hot here.

But that — it comes from elsewhere.

montee_taera.title: Taera
montee_taera.text:
Taera touches the rock while walking.

His fingers slide on the black surface.

**"The earth suffers here. *

**"For a long time? *

**"Always. *
**"It is his natural state. *

She takes her hand off.

**"Some places were born to burn. *
**"It makes them no less real. *

She's looking at you.

**"You were born to carry the Chaos. *
**"It makes you no less. *

She's back on her walk.

**"The earth knows. *
**"Even here. *

montee_vael.title: Vael
montee_vael.text:
Vael walks next to you.

He's trying to whistle.

The hot air distorts the sound.

He stops.

**"Even my music doesn't work here. *

**"It's a bad sign. *

**"Probably. *

He looks down at the lava.

**"I've been looking for a joke for today. *
**"All night. *

**"And? *

**"Nothing. *

He smiles.
Different than usual.

**"What proves it's serious. *
**"Because I always find a joke. *
**"Always. *

**"Except today. *

montee_ikar.title: Ikar
montee_ikar.text:
Ikar's in front.

Always.

You're speeding up.

He can hear you.
He's not slowing down.
He's not turning around.

**"Ikar. *

Nothing.

**"I know about tonight. *

He stops.

Long silence.

**"I wanted you to know..."**

**"No."** he says.

**"No? *

**"You don't have to tell me you understand. *
**"Or forgive. *
**"You don't owe anything. *

He turns around.

**"I have to be here. *
**"Today. *
**"That's all I can do. *

He's leaving again.

Slower this time.

montee_aryn.title: Aryn — The Last Word
montee_aryn.text:
Aryn's walking at your pace.

She's not looking at the top.

She's looking at you.

"Do you remember what Lyra told me? *

**"No. *

**"That doubt is water. *
**"He's bypassing. *
**"He's waiting. *
**"He ends up finding his way. *

She's taking a break.

**"The Chaos also finds its way. *
**"The question is which one. *

**"What if I choose the wrong one? *

She's looking at you.

Long time.

**"Then we were there anyway. *
**"And it will count. *
**"Even if you don't remember. *
**"We were there. *

avant_sommet.title: Before the Summit
avant_sommet.text:
Fifty meters.

You're stopping.

The lava is visible all around.
The sky of deep red.
The top that smokes.

The four are half a circle behind you.

Taera squeezes his purse.
Vael closes his eyes for a second.
Aryn puts his hand on his sword — not to draw.
Just to feel she's here.

Ikar.

Ikar's looking at you.

You're not Caël. * he says.

Just this.

You're not Caël. *

You hate your head.

You're up.

sommet_arrive.title: The Summit
sommet_arrive.narrator: The world is huge from here.
sommet_arrive.text:
The natural platform at the top.

The lava in a circle.
The red and black sky.
The burning wind.

You're stopping.

Your blade.

She's not vibrating anymore.

She's rumbling.

A sound you can't hear with your ears.

With the bones.

The Chaos recognizes the place.

He wants out.

**"Here. "** says Aryn.
**"Just a little more. *

His voice breaks on the last word.

Too late.

chaos_explose.title: Explosion
chaos_explose.text:
The black blade explodes.

Violet light in all directions.

The floor cracks around you.

All four back.

Ikar raises her blade — it lights up.
Aryn invokes a shield of water between her and the Chaos.
Taera plants his sword — a rock wall emerges.
Vael disappears in the air.

**" {{player}}!** Cree Taera.

You can't answer that.

Chaos speaks for you.

And the four —

The four are faced with what they have spent their entire lives preparing for.

They didn't step back.

None of them.

The fight begins.

combat_action1.title: Ikar
combat_action1.narrator: The Chaos is crossing you. You're out of control.
combat_action1.text:
Ikar charges first.

Sure.

It's Ikar.

Its burning blade traces an arc of fire in the warm air.

Direct.
No way.
As always.

The Chaos in you sees him coming.

A purple energy concentrates in your right hand.

You got a second.

One.

Hit.
Or hold back.

ikar_frappe.title: Ikar Touched
ikar_frappe.text:
The violet energy hits Ikar in the chest.

He's flying back.

Five meters.

He hits the rock.

The blade goes off.

Quiet.

He's not moving.

Just a second.

Two.

Taera shouts her name.

Ikar's getting up.

Slowly.
Very slowly.

He's watching his blade off.

He's holding the handle.

It's turning on again.

Kid.
Tremblant.
But now.

He's looking at you.

**" Again. *

His voice doesn't tremble.

His hands are.

He's still moving.

ikar_retenu.title: Deduction
ikar_retenu.text:
Energy goes to the lava.

She absorbs it with a whistle.

The lava rises a meter.

Fall back.

Ikar stops at a breath of you.

His burning blade between you.

He looks you in the eye.

**"You have retained. *

**"Yes. *

Something in his face.

Not relief.

The resolution.

**"Once again.** he said.

He's stepping back.

He's waiting for the rest with you.

entre_actions_1.title: Between the Waves
entre_actions_1.text:
The Chaos is pushing.

Like a heart.

Each beat sends a wave of energy.

You're in the center.

You see everything.

Aryn who keeps his water shield — the rising steam.
Taera holding his rock wall — his arms tremble.
Vael somewhere in the air — you hear it without seeing it.
Ikar standing — his blade that refuses to extinguish.

They hold.

All four of you.

For you.

combat_action2.title: Vael
combat_action2.text:
Vael reappears.

Behind you.

He's trying to surround your arms.

Not to hurt you.

To stabilize you.

The Chaos feels someone behind his back.

He's reacting.

Before you can decide.

choices.text: Let it go — let it go.

vael_frappe.title: Vael Touched
vael_frappe.text:
Energy explodes in circles.

Vael is projected.

It lands at the edge of the platform.

Exactly on the edge.

His hands grab the rock.

It's not falling.

But he's not up yet.

He's staying here.
Hands in the rock.
Head down.

Taera runs towards him.

He raises his hand.

I'm here. *

Then he turns to you.

His usual smile.

But his eyes —

His eyes don't smile.

**"I knew you weren't a monster. *

Just this.

He's getting up.

He's back in position.

vael_retenu.title: Stabilized
vael_retenu.text:
Energy goes to the lava.

Vael's got you.

His hands on your arms.

The air around you is swirling.

**"Here. He said in your ear.
**"Like this. *

**"Do you have a joke now? *

**"I'm looking for one. *
**"Leave me another thirty seconds. *

Still.

Despite the volcano.
The lava.
The Chaos.

You're laughing.

Just a second.

That's enough.

entre_actions_2.title: The Volcano Answers
entre_actions_2.text:
The ground is shaking.

The volcano responds to the Chaos.

The lava rises on the edges of the platform.

Aryn is screaming something.

You don't hear the words.

But you see his face.

No fear.

Determination.

She tightens her shield around you.

Water vapour against the heat of the lava.

She's got it.

For how long?

combat_action3.title: Aryn
combat_action3.text:
Aryn's moving into the Chaos.

Not his blade.

His hands open.

It creates a corridor of water between you.

Cold.
Calm down.
Impossible here.

But real.

**"Look at me.** she says.

The Chaos pushes against the corridor.

Aryn step back.

She's got it.

**"Look at me. *

aryn_frappe.title: Aryn Touched
aryn_frappe.text:
The Chaos breaks the corridor.

The water explodes in hot steam.

Aryn is projected back.

She's falling.

Ikar's here in two steps.

He's holding her before she touches the ground.

He's looking at her.

**"Aryn. *

**"I'm here.** she says.

His voice is normal.

His burnt hands are not.

She's back up.

She's looking at her palms.

**"Water doesn't scream. *

She's reshaping the hallway.

Smaller.

With his hands shaking.

But she's reforming him.

aryn_retenu.title: In the Corridor
aryn_retenu.text:
You look at her.

The Chaos is back.

Not much.

But enough.

In the cold water corridor —

A moment out of the Chaos.

**"Do you remember Cendral? "** says Aryn.

**"Yes. *

**"We do this for them. *
**"Not for prophecy. *
**"Not for the Order. *
**"For the people who live in the Ashendral of the world. *

The corridor is closing.

The Chaos is back.

But something remains.

avant_taera.title: The Last Wall
avant_taera.narrator: The lava is rising. The platform is shrinking.
avant_taera.text:
The platform cracks.

The lava moves on the edges.

Maybe there's 10 meters of stable rock left.

The four are here.

Wounded.
Exhausted.
Get up.

The Chaos keeps coming out.

He won't stop by himself.

We need something.

Or someone.

Taera puts his sword in the rock.

She takes something from her purse.

The seed she picked up the morning she left.

She squeezes it in her palm.

Then she moves.

moment_taera.title: Taera
moment_taera.narrator: The world is reduced to this platform.
moment_taera.text:
She's moving into the Chaos.

His clothes burn on the edges.

She's not stopping.

The heat of the lava behind it.
The Chaos in front.

She's moving.

Her hair burns slightly.

She's not stopping.

His hands bleed where the Chaos touches her.

She.
Don't.
Stop.
Not.

It's a meter away.

His eyes.

**" {{player}}. *

Your name.

**"I'm here. *

She opens her hand.

The seed in his palm.

**"The earth says you can. *

His hand stretched out.

taera_main_prise.title: Hand
taera_main_prise.text:
You take his hand.

The seed between your two palms.

Land against the Chaos.

Something's changing.

Violet energy does not disappear.

She's focused.

Like water that finds its bed.
Like a fire that finds its home.
Like air that finds its direction.
Like earth that finds its root.

Tear your hand.

Ikar's coming to your left.
His burning blade on your shoulder.
Hot.
Real.

Aryn to your right.
His shield of water that surrounds the five.

Vael back.
The whirling wind.

Five.

For the first time really five.

**"Now. "** says Aryn.

The Chaos is coming out.

Whole.

To the volcano.

The lava rises 20 meters.

The violet light disappears in the lava.

Quiet.

True silence.

apres_combat.title: After
apres_combat.text:
You look at your hands.

The black blade is here.

She's not vibrating anymore.
She's not absorbing anymore.

She's right here.

Cold.

As always.

You're looking up.

All four are standing.

Some barely.

But standing.

All four of you.

Vael suddenly sits on the rock.

**"Good.** he said.
**"It's done. *

**"Is that all you have to say?** asks Ikar.

**"I found a joke. *
**"But the timing is bad. *
**"I keep it for later. *

Ikar's watching him.

He's shaking his head.

But something in his face.

Something like a smile.

Almost.

evaluer_degats.title: The Prize
evaluer_degats.text:
Ikar is sitting.

His hand on his chest where you touched him.
Or not.

Vael's on his side.
Or not.

Aryn treats his burnt hands.
Or not.

Taera is next to you.
The seed always in his palm.

You look at her.

She opens her hand.

The seed is intact.

**"I plant it where we will build. "** she says.
**"Somewhere. *
**"Where something is needed that grows. *

Ikar looks up at you.

He's not saying anything.

He hits the rock twice with his fist.

Like his father was banging on the avil.

Good. *

fin_victoire_complete.title: End — The Storm Past
fin_victoire_complete.text:
The sun rises on the volcano.

Red first.
Then orange.
Then yellow.

You go down together.

Slowly.

Nobody talks for a long time.

Then Taera:

**"The earth suffers less here. *

**"Since when? *

**"Since that night. *

You touch the knife to your belt.

Marek's.

Hot again.

Still hot.

Vael finally whistles.

It works better downhill.

Ikar walks ahead.
As always.

But he's waiting at the turn.

Aryn's walking next to you.

**"What are you thinking? *

**"In Cendral. *
**"On the wall of the square. *
*"To Mira and his bread. *
*"To Luke and his broken wand. *

**"They will rebuild. *

**"I know. *

**"What about you? *

You look at the black blade.

It absorbs the morning light.

Cold.

*"Me too. *

fin_victoire_blessures.title: End — Blood Price
fin_victoire_blessures.text:
The descent is slow.

Some are limping.
Some people lean.

You look at their wounds.

The wounds you've done.

Vael sees you looking.

**"Stop that face. *

**"What? *

**"This face. *
**"We're up. *
**"All five. *
**"This is the result. *

He's trying to smile.

It hurts to see that he's trying.

Taera walks next to you.

**"The scars remain.** she says.
**"It's normal. *
**"It means something real happened. *

Ikar doesn't say anything all along.

At the bottom of the volcano it stops.

He's looking at you.

He's laying his hand on your shoulder.

Just a second.

He's taking it off.

He continues.

That's how he forgives.

You know that.

Now you know.

taera_main_refusee.title: Apply
taera_main_refusee.text:
You're back.

Taera is still moving forward.

**" {{player}}. *

The Chaos explodes.

It's projected.

Ikar shouts his name.

He's running.

He's holding her.

He holds her in his arms.

He's looking at you.

No anger.

Something worse.

Pain.

Aryn is screaming something.
Vael shouts something.

The Chaos no longer hears them.

The Chaos can't hear anything anymore.

And you—

You look.

Taera's hand.

Still tense.

Even down.

She's still reaching out.

chaos_deborde.title: Overflow
chaos_deborde.text:
The Chaos is coming out.

There's no more in there.
No more outside.

Just the Chaos.

The four are here.

Ikar holding Taera.
Aryn in front of them.
Vael that materializes between you and others.

A rampart.

The Chaos crosses them.

Not to kill them.

To pass.

Beyond the platform.
Beyond the volcano.
To Aerith.

To everything.

un_moment.title: A Moment
un_moment.text:
A moment ago.

One.

Where you see their faces.

Ikar doesn't hit.
Who can't.
Who made that choice.

Aryn whose eyes say:
I knew it wasn't your fault. *

Vael's still looking for a joke.
To give you a way out.
A door.
Something.

Taera whose hand is still stretched.

Again.

Even now.

This moment lasts for a second.

An eternity.

And then the Chaos goes back.

And you with him.

fin_chaos_regne.title: End — What We Leave
fin_chaos_regne.text:
Aerith wears the scars.

Cities are rebuilding.
People remember.
Children learn the new legend.

There's a new statue in Aurenthal.

Not from you.

Four.

Ikar holding Taera.
Aryn in front of them.
Vael between them and the Chaos.

They held to the end. *

That's what we're burning on.

Not their victories.

Their way of staying.

Somewhere — we don't know where —

A seed grows in the rock of a volcano.

Nobody understood how.

She's still here.

verite_conversations.title: What they really said
verite_conversations.text:
You're going down slowly.

You stop.

**"I heard your conversations. *

All four of them stop.

**"From the beginning. *

Quiet.

Aryn turns around.

**"We know. *

**"Then tell me what that meant. *

choices.text: « Ready for anything — what was it? »
"And if we are wrong — wrong of what? »

explication_pret_a_tout.title: Loans to All
explication_pret_a_tout.text:
Ikar's responding.

Without hesitation.

**"The spirits have told us that since we were ten years old. *
**« Ready for anything. *

**"And I realized that it meant..."**

**"...kill me if necessary. You're done.

**"Yes. *

He's looking at you.

**"For a long time I thought that was it. *
**"That was my role. *
**"The ultimate option. *

**"And at night in the camp..."**

**"I had decided.** he said.
**"Even before you get to know yourself. *
**"I had decided that if the Chaos became too strong..."**

He stops.

**"And then? *

**"Then I saw you. *
**"A kid who wanted to protect his village. *
**"Who had lost everything while trying. *

He looks at his hands.

**"It was more the same. *

Aryn puts his hand on his shoulder.

**« Ready for all this didn't mean killing. "** she says.
**"It meant being ready to give everything we have. *
**"Even our certainty that we were right. *

Ikar looks up.

**"I took time to understand. *

explication_erreurs.title: Same Errors
explication_erreurs.text:
Aryn answers this time.

**"The elders made a mistake with Caël. *

**"Which one? *

**"They tried to kill him first. *
**"Before reaching out. *
**"And when they finally reached out..."**
It was too late for them. *
**"Caël stopped. *
**"But they died anyway. *
**"Because they waited too long. *

**"So the same mistakes were..."**

**"Wait. "** she says.
**"And treat Chaos as a threat above all else. *
**"Before treating him as a person. *

Ikar crosses arms.

**"I disagreed. *

**"I know. "** says Aryn.
**"That's why we were fighting. *

**"You were fighting for me. *

**"For you. "** says Taera.
**"Not on you. *
**"It's different. *

choices.text: "And if we are wrong — wrong of what? »

explication_tort.title: And if We A Tort
explication_tort.text:
**"What if we're wrong — what was that question? *

Ikar's responding.

**"Tort to trust you. *

**"You thought I was going to destroy everything. *

**"Yes. *

He's not trying to soften.

**"What about Aryn? *

"I thought we were wrong not to trust you. *
**"That the real mistake was to start again as with Caël. *
**"To treat Chaos as a threat. *
**"Before treating the person as a person. *

**"You disagreed. *

**"No."** says Aryn.
**"We rarely are. *

Vael raises his hand.

**"I had an opinion. *

**"What?** asks Ikar.

**"You were both right. *
**"And the real question was not wrong or not wrong. *
**"That was—we are here. *

He's lifting his shoulders.

**"We were there. *
**"Result. *

explication_final.title: Trust him
explication_final.text:
**"One last thing. *

They're waiting.

**"Trust him." *
**"I heard that too. *

Aryn's smiling.

Not much.

But really.

**"It was me. "** she says.
**"Ikar asked what to do if it went wrong. *
**"If the Chaos took over completely. *

**"And you said you trusted him. *

**"Yes. *

**"Even in this case. *

**" Especially in this case. *

Long silence.

Taera is approaching.

She's taking your hand.

The same hand on the top.

**"See now? *

**"What you said. *

**"Yes. *

**"And what we meant. *

You look at the black blade.

It absorbs the evening light.

Cold.

As always.

**"Thank you. * you say.

Not enough.

But it's a start.
